con:call.name: Request 1
con:call.con:request: <soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:ews="http://ews.adapters.psp.payroll.sbd.intuit.com/"> <soapenv:Header/> <soapenv:Body> <ews:Create_Account> <PSIMessage> <Action>CREATE_ACCOUNT</Action> <Company> <EIN>910203067</EIN> <PayrollAdmin> <Title>Mr</Title> <TitleSuffix/> <FirstName>Tom</FirstName> <MiddleInitial>J</MiddleInitial> <LastName>Jones</LastName> <JobTitle>Owner</JobTitle> <Email>tomjones@aol.com</Email> <WorkPhone>775-400-1000</WorkPhone> <HomePhone>775-400-1001</HomePhone> </PayrollAdmin> <PrimaryPrincipal> <Title>Mrs</Title> <TitleSuffix/> <FirstName>Tomala</FirstName> <MiddleInitial/> <LastName>Jones</LastName> <JobTitle>Co-owner</JobTitle> <Email>tjones@aol.com</Email> <WorkPhone>775-400-1000</WorkPhone> <HomePhone>775-400-1002</HomePhone> <HomeAddress> <Address1>123 Crooner Lane</Address1> <City>Los Angeles</City> <State>CA</State> <Zip>98001</Zip> </HomeAddress> </PrimaryPrincipal> <SecondaryPrincipal> <FirstName/> <MiddleInitial/> <LastName/> <JobTitle/> <Email/> <WorkPhone>null</WorkPhone> <HomePhone>null</HomePhone> <HomeAddress> <Zip>nullnull</Zip> </HomeAddress> </SecondaryPrincipal> <QuickBooks> <AppVer>16.00.B.12/20404#pro</AppVer> <AppId>QBWPRO</AppId> </QuickBooks> <LegalInfo> <LegalName>TOM JONES INC</LegalName> <LegalAddress1>125 CROONER LANE</LegalAddress1> <LegalCity>RENO</LegalCity> <LegalState>NV</LegalState> <LegalZip>89501</LegalZip> </LegalInfo> <DBA>TOM JONES INC</DBA> <ShippingAddress> <Address1>125 CROONER LANE</Address1> <City>RENO</City> <State>NV</State> <Zip>89501</Zip> </ShippingAddress> <MailingAddress> <Address1>125 CROONER LANE</Address1> <Address2>Apt B234</Address2> <City>RENO</City> <State>NV</State> <Zip>89501</Zip> </MailingAddress> <LicenceNumber>0011-2233-4567</LicenceNumber> <W2DeliveryPref>mail</W2DeliveryPref> <ClientPacketDeliveryPref>mail</ClientPacketDeliveryPref> </Company> <Feature> <FeatureName>Assisted</FeatureName> <Bank> <BankName>Nevada State Bank</BankName> <BankAccountNumber>9988550033</BankAccountNumber> <BankRoutingNumber>012012210</BankRoutingNumber> <BankAccountQBName>QB Checking</BankAccountQBName> <BankAccountType>CHECKING</BankAccountType> <RandomDollarDebitRequest>true</RandomDollarDebitRequest> </Bank> <OfferCode>P00021</OfferCode> <SourceCode>s00012</SourceCode> <Agreement> <AgreementName>Basic</AgreementName> <SubscriptionNum>34044</SubscriptionNum> <ServiceKey>4000-234-9074-778</ServiceKey> <CRISRowId>1-h3i890</CRISRowId> <SubType>QB Payroll Assisted</SubType> <PriceType>Standard</PriceType> <AddEIN>false</AddEIN> </Agreement> <OnHold>false</OnHold> </Feature> <DateTimeStamp>1988-04-07T18:39:09</DateTimeStamp> <ServerId>IDTest</ServerId> <ServerPassword>PasswordTest</ServerPassword> </PSIMessage> </ews:Create_Account> </soapenv:Body> </soapenv:Envelope>

con:part.con:content: <definitions name="EWSAdapterService" targetNamespace="http://ews.adapters.psp.payroll.sbd.intuit.com/" xmlns="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:tns="http://ews.adapters.psp.payroll.sbd.intuit.com/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <types> <xs:schema targetNamespace="http://ews.adapters.psp.payroll.sbd.intuit.com/" version="1.0" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:element name="Activate_Feature" type="tns:Activate_Feature"/> <xs:element name="Activate_FeatureResponse" type="tns:Activate_FeatureResponse"/> <xs:element name="Authenticate_PIN" type="tns:Authenticate_PIN"/> <xs:element name="Authenticate_PINResponse" type="tns:Authenticate_PINResponse"/> <xs:element name="Create_Account" type="tns:Create_Account"/> <xs:element name="Create_AccountResponse" type="tns:Create_AccountResponse"/> <xs:element name="Create_PIN" type="tns:Create_PIN"/> <xs:element name="Create_PINResponse" type="tns:Create_PINResponse"/> <xs:element name="Debug_Set_Feature_Status" type="tns:Debug_Set_Feature_Status"/> <xs:element name="Debug_Set_Feature_StatusResponse" type="tns:Debug_Set_Feature_StatusResponse"/> <xs:element name="Get_Monthly_Fee" type="tns:Get_Monthly_Fee"/> <xs:element name="Get_Monthly_FeeResponse" type="tns:Get_Monthly_FeeResponse"/> <xs:element name="Inactivate_Feature" type="tns:Inactivate_Feature"/> <xs:element name="Inactivate_FeatureResponse" type="tns:Inactivate_FeatureResponse"/> <xs:element name="Migrate_Account" type="tns:Migrate_Account"/> <xs:element name="Migrate_AccountResponse" type="tns:Migrate_AccountResponse"/> <xs:element name="Query_Acct" type="tns:Query_Acct"/> <xs:element name="Query_AcctResponse" type="tns:Query_AcctResponse"/> <xs:element name="Query_Offer" type="tns:Query_Offer"/> <xs:element name="Query_OfferResponse" type="tns:Query_OfferResponse"/> <xs:element name="Update_Account" type="tns:Update_Account"/> <xs:element name="Update_AccountResponse" type="tns:Update_AccountResponse"/> <xs:element name="Update_Bank" type="tns:Update_Bank"/> <xs:element name="Update_BankResponse" type="tns:Update_BankResponse"/> <xs:element name="Update_PIN" type="tns:Update_PIN"/> <xs:element name="Update_PINResponse" type="tns:Update_PINResponse"/> <xs:element name="Valid_Bank" type="tns:Valid_Bank"/> <xs:element name="Valid_BankResponse" type="tns:Valid_BankResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="Create_Account"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="PSIMessage"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Action" type="tns:actionEnum"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="RespStatus" type="tns:ResponseType"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Company" type="tns:CompanyType"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Feature" type="tns:FeatureType"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Fee" type="tns:FeeType"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="DateTimeStamp" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ServerId" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ServerPassword" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ForceRandomDollar" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Offer" type="tns:OfferType"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="ResponseType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ErrorCode" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ErrorText" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="CompanyType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSID" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="EIN" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PayrollAdmin" type="tns:ContactType"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PrimaryPrincipal" type="tns:ContactType"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="SecondaryPrincipal" type="tns:ContactType"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="QuickBooks" type="tns:QuickBooksType"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LegalInfo" type="tns:LegalType"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="DBA" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PIN" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="OldPIN" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PINExists" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="W2DeliveryPref" type="tns:deliveryEnum"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ClientPacketDeliveryPref" type="tns:deliveryEnum"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ShippingAddress" type="tns:AddressType"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="MailingAddress" type="tns:AddressType"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LicenceNumber" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LastConnectedDateTime" type="xs:dateTime"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="ContactType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Title" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="TitleSuffix" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="FirstName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="MiddleInitial" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LastName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="JobTitle" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Email" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="WorkPhone" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="HomePhone" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="HomeAddress" type="tns:AddressType"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="AddressType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Address1" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Address2" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="City" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="State" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Zip" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="QuickBooksType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AppVer" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AppId" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="LegalType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LegalName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LegalAddress1" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LegalAddress2" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LegalCity" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LegalState" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LegalZip" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="FeatureType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="FeatureName" type="tns:featureEnum"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Bank" type="tns:BankType"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="OfferCode" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="SourceCode" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriceCode" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="MostCurrentTaxYear" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Agreement" type="tns:AgreementType"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Status" type="tns:statusEnum"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="OnHold" type="xs:boolean"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="BankType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BankName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BankAccountNumber" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BankRoutingNumber" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BankAccountQBName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BankAccountType" type="tns:bankAccountTypeEnum"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="RandomDollarDebitRequest" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BankVerificationStatus" type="tns:bankVerificationStatusEnum"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="HoldReason" type="tns:holdReasonEnum"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PendingPayrollExists" type="tns:pendingPayrollExistsEnum"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="RandomDollar1" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="RandomDollar2" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="NoOfRetries" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LastRetryDateTime" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="RandomDebitDateTime" type="xs:dateTime"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="AgreementType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AgreementName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ServiceType" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="SubscriptionNum" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ServiceKey" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CRISRowId" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="SubType" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriceType" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AddEIN" type="xs:boolean"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="FeeType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="MonthlyFee" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="OfferType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="OfferCode" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Description" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Create_AccountResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Update_Account"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Update_AccountResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Migrate_Account"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Migrate_AccountResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Activate_Feature"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Activate_FeatureResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Query_Acct"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Query_AcctResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Valid_Bank"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Valid_BankResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Create_PIN"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Create_PINResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Update_Bank"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Update_BankResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Update_PIN"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Update_PINResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Inactivate_Feature"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Inactivate_FeatureResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Authenticate_PIN"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Authenticate_PINResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Query_Offer"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Query_OfferResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Get_Monthly_Fee"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Get_Monthly_FeeResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Debug_Set_Feature_Status"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Debug_Set_Feature_StatusResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PSIMessage" type="tns:PSIMessage"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:simpleType name="actionEnum"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="CREATE_ACCOUNT"/> <xs:enumeration value="UPDATE_ACCOUNT"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="deliveryEnum"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="mail"/> <xs:enumeration value="electronic"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="featureEnum"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="DD"/> <xs:enumeration value="Assisted"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="bankAccountTypeEnum"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="CHECKING"/> <xs:enumeration value="SAVINGS"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="bankVerificationStatusEnum"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="New"/> <xs:enumeration value="Verified"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="holdReasonEnum"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="ACHREJECT"/> <xs:enumeration value="DDLIMIT"/> <xs:enumeration value="NACHA"/> <xs:enumeration value="OTHER"/> <xs:enumeration value="PAPERWORK"/> <xs:enumeration value="RISK"/> <xs:enumeration value="BANKCHANGE"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="pendingPayrollExistsEnum"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="Y"/> <xs:enumeration value="N"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="statusEnum"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="A"/> <xs:enumeration value="PP"/> <xs:enumeration value="PB"/> <xs:enumeration value="PE"/> <xs:enumeration value="PU"/> <xs:enumeration value="CC"/> <xs:enumeration value="TI"/> <xs:enumeration value="Sub"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> </xs:schema> </types> <message name="EWSAdapter_Authenticate_PINResponse"> <part element="tns:Authenticate_PINResponse" name="Authenticate_PINResponse"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Create_PINResponse"> <part element="tns:Create_PINResponse" name="Create_PINResponse"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Activate_Feature"> <part element="tns:Activate_Feature" name="Activate_Feature"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Update_Bank"> <part element="tns:Update_Bank" name="Update_Bank"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Inactivate_FeatureResponse"> <part element="tns:Inactivate_FeatureResponse" name="Inactivate_FeatureResponse"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Debug_Set_Feature_StatusResponse"> <part element="tns:Debug_Set_Feature_StatusResponse" name="Debug_Set_Feature_StatusResponse"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Valid_BankResponse"> <part element="tns:Valid_BankResponse" name="Valid_BankResponse"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Update_BankResponse"> <part element="tns:Update_BankResponse" name="Update_BankResponse"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Update_PINResponse"> <part element="tns:Update_PINResponse" name="Update_PINResponse"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Query_AcctResponse"> <part element="tns:Query_AcctResponse" name="Query_AcctResponse"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Update_PIN"> <part element="tns:Update_PIN" name="Update_PIN"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Create_AccountResponse"> <part element="tns:Create_AccountResponse" name="Create_AccountResponse"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Inactivate_Feature"> <part element="tns:Inactivate_Feature" name="Inactivate_Feature"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Create_PIN"> <part element="tns:Create_PIN" name="Create_PIN"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Debug_Set_Feature_Status"> <part element="tns:Debug_Set_Feature_Status" name="Debug_Set_Feature_Status"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Valid_Bank"> <part element="tns:Valid_Bank" name="Valid_Bank"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Activate_FeatureResponse"> <part element="tns:Activate_FeatureResponse" name="Activate_FeatureResponse"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Get_Monthly_FeeResponse"> <part element="tns:Get_Monthly_FeeResponse" name="Get_Monthly_FeeResponse"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Authenticate_PIN"> <part element="tns:Authenticate_PIN" name="Authenticate_PIN"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Query_OfferResponse"> <part element="tns:Query_OfferResponse" name="Query_OfferResponse"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Get_Monthly_Fee"> <part element="tns:Get_Monthly_Fee" name="Get_Monthly_Fee"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Query_Acct"> <part element="tns:Query_Acct" name="Query_Acct"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Migrate_Account"> <part element="tns:Migrate_Account" name="Migrate_Account"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Update_Account"> <part element="tns:Update_Account" name="Update_Account"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Update_AccountResponse"> <part element="tns:Update_AccountResponse" name="Update_AccountResponse"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Create_Account"> <part element="tns:Create_Account" name="Create_Account"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Migrate_AccountResponse"> <part element="tns:Migrate_AccountResponse" name="Migrate_AccountResponse"/> </message> <message name="EWSAdapter_Query_Offer"> <part element="tns:Query_Offer" name="Query_Offer"/> </message> <portType name="EWSAdapter"> <operation name="Activate_Feature" parameterOrder="Activate_Feature"> <input message="tns:EWSAdapter_Activate_Feature"/> <output message="tns:EWSAdapter_Activate_FeatureResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="Authenticate_PIN" parameterOrder="Authenticate_PIN"> <input message="tns:EWSAdapter_Authenticate_PIN"/> <output message="tns:EWSAdapter_Authenticate_PINResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="Create_Account" parameterOrder="Create_Account"> <input message="tns:EWSAdapter_Create_Account"/> <output message="tns:EWSAdapter_Create_AccountResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="Create_PIN" parameterOrder="Create_PIN"> <input message="tns:EWSAdapter_Create_PIN"/> <output message="tns:EWSAdapter_Create_PINResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="Debug_Set_Feature_Status" parameterOrder="Debug_Set_Feature_Status"> <input message="tns:EWSAdapter_Debug_Set_Feature_Status"/> <output message="tns:EWSAdapter_Debug_Set_Feature_StatusResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="Get_Monthly_Fee" parameterOrder="Get_Monthly_Fee"> <input message="tns:EWSAdapter_Get_Monthly_Fee"/> <output message="tns:EWSAdapter_Get_Monthly_FeeResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="Inactivate_Feature" parameterOrder="Inactivate_Feature"> <input message="tns:EWSAdapter_Inactivate_Feature"/> <output message="tns:EWSAdapter_Inactivate_FeatureResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="Migrate_Account" parameterOrder="Migrate_Account"> <input message="tns:EWSAdapter_Migrate_Account"/> <output message="tns:EWSAdapter_Migrate_AccountResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="Query_Acct" parameterOrder="Query_Acct"> <input message="tns:EWSAdapter_Query_Acct"/> <output message="tns:EWSAdapter_Query_AcctResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="Query_Offer" parameterOrder="Query_Offer"> <input message="tns:EWSAdapter_Query_Offer"/> <output message="tns:EWSAdapter_Query_OfferResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="Update_Account" parameterOrder="Update_Account"> <input message="tns:EWSAdapter_Update_Account"/> <output message="tns:EWSAdapter_Update_AccountResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="Update_Bank" parameterOrder="Update_Bank"> <input message="tns:EWSAdapter_Update_Bank"/> <output message="tns:EWSAdapter_Update_BankResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="Update_PIN" parameterOrder="Update_PIN"> <input message="tns:EWSAdapter_Update_PIN"/> <output message="tns:EWSAdapter_Update_PINResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="Valid_Bank" parameterOrder="Valid_Bank"> <input message="tns:EWSAdapter_Valid_Bank"/> <output message="tns:EWSAdapter_Valid_BankResponse"/> </operation> </portType> <binding name="EWSAdapterBinding" type="tns:EWSAdapter"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <operation name="Activate_Feature"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="Authenticate_PIN"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="Create_Account"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="Create_PIN"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="Debug_Set_Feature_Status"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="Get_Monthly_Fee"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="Inactivate_Feature"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="Migrate_Account"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="Query_Acct"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="Query_Offer"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="Update_Account"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="Update_Bank"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="Update_PIN"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="Valid_Bank"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <service name="EWSAdapterService"> <port binding="tns:EWSAdapterBinding" name="EWSAdapterPort">
